metadata.description: A phased, multi-agent workflow that asks what it needs, then autonomously builds AND deploys modern, high-converting landing pages that don't look AI-generated.

plugins.name: landing-craft
plugins.description: Leads with an autonomous market study, then orchestrates 12 sub-agents (init → research → strategy → architecture → copy → design → build (multi-page) → motion → polish → seo → review → deploy) to ship a modern, high-converting, multi-page site that doesn't look AI-generated. Bundles the design stack (motion-craft, marketing-strategy, brand-voice, seo-geo, design-review-loop, web-assets) + fetches Impeccable; generates its own assets; analytics-ready; Next.js + Tailwind; Claude Code · OpenCode · Cursor.
